name: waza
description: Engineering workflow skills for Codex: think, check, hunt, ui, read, write, learn, and health.

interface.longDescription: Waza packages eight engineering habits as Codex skills: think for planning, check for review, hunt for debugging, ui for frontend work, read for source intake, write for prose, learn for domain research, and health for agent configuration audits.
defaultPrompt: Use Waza think to plan this change
Use Waza check to review this diff
Use Waza hunt to debug this failure
